import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import axios from 'axios'; const API = 'http://localhost:5000/api'; const M_LABELS = { random_forest: 'Random Forest', logistic_regression: 'Logistic Regression', decision_tree: 'Decision Tree' }; export default function History() { const [predictions, setPredictions] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { axios.get(`${API}/prediction/my`) .then(res => setPredictions(res.data.predictions)) .catch(() => {}) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); if (loading) return
; return (
Prediction History

All your past placement predictions

{predictions.length === 0 ? (
📭

No predictions yet

Go to Predict to make your first one!

Make a Prediction →
) : ( <> {/* Mobile cards */}
{predictions.map(p => (
📅 {new Date(p.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')} {p.result.placed ? 'Placed' : 'Not Placed'}
{p.inputs.cgpa}CGPA
{p.inputs.internships}Internships
{p.inputs.technical_skills}/10Tech Skills
{p.inputs.communication_skills}/10Comm.
{p.inputs.aptitude_score}Aptitude
{p.result.probability}% Probability
{M_LABELS[p.result.model_used]} · {p.result.model_accuracy}% accuracy
))}
{/* Desktop table */}
{predictions.map(p => ( ))}
DateCGPAIntern.Tech Comm.AptitudeProjectsModelProbabilityResult
{new Date(p.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()} {p.inputs.cgpa} {p.inputs.internships} {p.inputs.technical_skills}/10 {p.inputs.communication_skills}/10 {p.inputs.aptitude_score} {p.inputs.projects} {M_LABELS[p.result.model_used]} {p.result.probability}% {p.result.placed ? 'Placed' : 'Not Placed'}
)}
); }
